chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Bail.Appl.No.D- 69 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 221/2018. 2. For orders on statement. 11.01.2018. Mr. Altaf Hussain Chandio, Advocate for applicants alongwith applicants. Syed Meeral Shah, D.P.G. for the State. = 1. Granted. 2. It appears from the record that applicants were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this court vide order dated 06.12.2017 subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and P.R. Bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Today the applicants are present on bail. Learned counsel for the applicants submits that during investigation the present applicants were found innocent and such report under ‘C’ class was present before the trial court who approved the same, therefore, according to him at present nothing is pending adjudication against the present applicants therefore, through this statement, he withdraws this bail application. Learned A.P.G. present in court waives notice and recorded his no objection if the prayer of learned counsel is allowed. In view of the above, instant bail application has become infructuous and disposed of accordingly. Since the applicants are no more required in the case, therefore, office is directed to return the surety papers / amount to the surety after proper verification and identification. JUDGE JUDGE
